title: Silver Kit Ore
description: Start your journey strong! Silver Ore Kit adds a simple, vanilla-style Silver tier with a crucial bonus against Undead mobs.
body:
# Silver Ore Kit

Is a straightforward resource mod that introduces a new mineral tier to the world of Minecraft. Designed to feel like a natural extension of the vanilla game, this mod provides a complete set of gear and a unique early-game advantage.

Key Features
New Resource: The Silver Ore now spawns in the Overworld, providing a valuable resource for your early-to-mid-game progression.

Complete Gear Set: Craft a full set of Silver items:

Armor: A complete set of Silver Armor.

Weapons: Silver Swords, Axes, and other weapons.

Tools: Silver Pickaxes, Shovels, and Hoes.

Undead Damage Bonus: Items crafted from Silver possess a powerful trait: they deal extra damage to Undead mobs (Zombies, Skeletons, Phantoms, etc.). This makes the Silver gear highly effective for night defense and tackling challenging initial structures.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mbaeyUex4a4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Ideal For
This mod is perfect for:

Modpack Creators looking for a simple, balanced mineral for progression paths.

Players who want a small, vanilla-style addition with a unique combat utility.
